race.comment: CALL ME MOJO (1) was ridden more aggressively last time out and responded by boxing on well for second over 1500m at Hawkesbury. Rock hard fit and gets all the favours from a nice draw. CORPULENT (3) called on all reserves to register his maiden win recently over this distance at Kembla. Lightly raced three-year-old with plenty of scope for improvement. ARANESE (8) hasn't won for around 18 months but went close last start over 1500m at Kembla. A 32-day gap between runs is the query but he is in the mix from a good gate down in the weights. Last start Bathurst maiden winner ITALUS (4) takes a big leap in class today but has only raced twice so there is a stack of upside.
